name: agileplus
description: AgilePlus MCP server — spec-driven development engine

tools.name: agileplus_feature_status
tools.description: Get the current status of a feature including state, WP progress, governance gate status, and recommended next action

tools.name: agileplus_list_features
tools.description: List all features with their current states and WP progress

state_filter.description: Optional state filter (created, specified, researched, planned, implementing, validated, shipped)

tools.name: agileplus_wp_status
tools.description: Get status of a specific work package including PR state, review status, and blockers

tools.name: agileplus_governance_check
tools.description: Check if a feature passes governance gates for a given state transition

tools.name: agileplus_audit_trail
tools.description: Get the audit trail for a feature, optionally filtered by WP

tools.name: agileplus_verify_audit_chain
tools.description: Verify the integrity of a feature's hash-chained audit log

tools.name: agileplus_read_spec
tools.description: Read the specification for a feature

section.description: Optional: specific section name to return

tools.name: agileplus_dispatch_command
tools.description: Dispatch an AgilePlus command (specify, research, plan, implement, validate, ship, retrospective)
